title: Printable worksheets / one-pagers (offline, B/W + screen-reader friendly)
context: Many learners access educational materials offline or in low-bandwidth settings, or work with facilitators who print materials for in-person sessions. Printable worksheets and one-pagers derived from the curriculum source enable these use cases without requiring internet access. They must be usable in black-and-white (no color-dependent information), screen-reader/tagged-PDF friendly for learners using assistive technology, and carry the not-advice framing. They are generated from the same MDX source as the curriculum lessons to ensure consistency.
objective: Design and implement printable worksheet and one-pager templates for the core curriculum modules: offline-friendly, B/W-printable, tagged-PDF accessible, and rendered from the same source as the curriculum.
acceptanceCriteria: Printable worksheets and one-pagers are generated from the same MDX source as the curriculum lessons (single source of truth)
Usable in black-and-white: no information conveyed by color alone; all charts/diagrams readable in B/W
Screen-reader and tagged-PDF friendly: PDF/UA or WCAG PDF accessibility; headings, lists, and figures properly tagged
Each printable carries 'Educational information, not financial advice' framing and the non-commercial redirect pointer; linter-clean (no product/brand content)
Plain-language review passed; readability at or below grade 8 for foundational worksheets
Build process documented: how to generate PDFs from source (e.g., via the static-site generator or a PDF rendering step)
output: A merged PR adding printable worksheet and one-pager templates (print/) generated from the curriculum source, with B/W + accessibility requirements met and the build process documented.
